    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class DelayManager {\n\n\n  async checkDelay(\n    name: string,\n    group: string,\n    timeout: number,\n  ): Promise\u003cDelayUpdate\u003e {\n    debugLog(\n      &#96;[DelayManager] 开始测试延迟，代理: ${name}, 组: ${group}, 超时: ${timeout}ms&#96;,\n    );\n\n    // 先将状态设置为测试中\n    this.setDelay(name, group, -2);\n\n    let delay = -1;\n    let elapsed = 0;\n\n    const startTime = Date.now();\n\n    try {\n      const url = this.getUrl(group);\n      debugLog(&#96;[DelayManager] 调用API测试延迟，代理: ${name}, URL: ${url}&#96;);\n\n      // 设置超时处理, delay = 0 为超时\n      const timeoutPromise = new Promise\u003cProxyDelay\u003e((resolve) =\u003e {\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e resolve({ delay: 0 }), timeout);\n      });\n\n      // 使用Promise.race来实现超时控制\n      const result = await Promise.race([\n        delayProxyByName(name, url, timeout),\n        timeoutPromise,\n      ]);\n\n      const elapsedTime = Date.now() - startTime;\n\n      delay = result.delay;\n      elapsed = elapsedTime;\n      debugLog(&#96;[DelayManager] 延迟测试完成，代理: ${name}, 结果: ${delay}ms&#96;);\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(&#96;[DelayManager] 延迟测试出错，代理: ${name}&#96;, error);\n      delay = 1e6; // error\n      elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;\n    }\n\n    return this.setDelay(name, group, delay, { elapsed });\n  }\n\n  async checkListDelay(\n    nameList: string[],\n    group: string,\n    timeout: number,\n    concurrency = 36,\n  ) {\n    \n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyItemMini = \n() =\u003e {\n\n  }, [isPreset, proxy.name, group.name]);\n\n  const updateDelay = useCallback(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxy) return;\n    const cachedUpdate = delayManager.getDelayUpdate(proxy.name, group.name);\n    if (cachedUpdate) {\n      setDelayState({ ...cachedUpdate });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const fallbackDelay = delayManager.getDelayFix(proxy, group.name);\n    if (fallbackDelay === -1) {\n      setDelayState({ delay: -1, updatedAt: 0 });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    let updatedAt = 0;\n    const history = proxy.history;\n    if (history \u0026\u0026 history.length \u003e 0) {\n      const lastRecord = history[history.length - 1];\n      const parsed = Date.parse(lastRecord.time);\n      if (!Number.isNaN(parsed)) {\n        updatedAt = parsed;\n      }\n    }\n\n    setDelayState({\n      delay: fallbackDelay,\n      updatedAt,\n    });\n  }, [proxy, group.name]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    updateDelay();\n  }, [updateDelay]);\n\n  const onDelay = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {\n    setDelayState({ delay: -2, updatedAt: Date.now() });\n    setDelayState(\n      await delayManager.checkDelay(proxy.name, group.name, timeout),\n    );\n  });\n\n  const delayValue = delayState.delay;\n\n  return\n;",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    fun update(snap: Boolean): Boolean {\n        val frameTime = System.currentTimeMillis()\n        var invalidate = false\n\n        if (proxy.type.group) {\n            title = proxy.name\n\n            if (link == null) {\n                subtitle = proxy.type.name\n            } else {\n                if (linkNow !== link.now) {\n                    linkNow = link.now\n\n                    subtitle = \"%s(%s)\".format(\n                        proxy.type.name,\n                        link.now.ifEmpty { \"*\" }\n                    )\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            title = proxy.title\n            subtitle = proxy.subtitle\n        }\n\n        if (delay != proxy.delay) {\n            delay = proxy.delay\n            if (proxy.delay in 0..Short.MAX_VALUE) {\n                delayText = proxy.delay.toString()\n                delayTimeout = false\n            } else {\n                delayText = \"T\"\n                delayTimeout = true\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (parentNow !== parent.now || parentNowIsManual != parent.nowIsManual) {\n            parentNow = parent.now\n            parentNowIsManual = parent.nowIsManual\n            // 始终高亮 core 的「当前节点」；仅当该节点为手动选择时显示手动标志\n            selected = proxy.name == parent.now\n        }\n\n        controls = if (selected) config.selectedControl else config.unselectedControl\n\n        if (snap) {\n            background = if (selected) config.selectedBackground else config.unselectedBackground\n        } else {\n            val target = if (selected) config.selectedBackground else config.unselectedBackground",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyHead = \n\n [groupName, testUrl, url]);\n\n  return (\n    \u003cBox sx={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: 0.5, ...sx }}\u003e\n      \u003cIconButton\n        size=\"small\"\n        color=\"inherit\"\n        title={t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.locate\")}\n        onClick={onLocation}\n      \u003e\n        \u003cMyLocationRounded /\u003e\n      \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n\n      \u003cIconButton\n        size=\"small\"\n        color=\"inherit\"\n        title={t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.delayCheck\")}\n        onClick={() =\u003e {\n          debugLog(&#96;[ProxyHead] 点击延迟测试按钮，组: ${groupName}&#96;);\n          // Remind the user that it is custom test url\n          if (testUrl?.trim() \u0026\u0026 textState !== \"filter\") {\n            debugLog(&#96;[ProxyHead] 使用自定义测试URL: ${testUrl}&#96;);\n            onHeadState({ textState: \"url\" });\n          }\n          onCheckDelay();\n        }}\n      \u003e\n        \u003cNetworkCheckRounded /\u003e\n      \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n\n      \u003cIconButton\n        size=\"small\"\n        color=\"inherit\"\n        title={\n          [\n            t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.sortDefault\"),\n            t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.sortDelay\"),\n            t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.sortName\"),\n          ][sortType]\n        }\n        onClick={() =\u003e\n          onHeadState({ sortType: ((sortType + 1) % 3) as ProxySortType })\n        }\n      \u003e\n        {sortType !== 1 \u0026\u0026 sortType !== 2 \u0026\u0026 \u003cSortRounded /\u003e}\n        {sortType === 1 \u0026\u0026 \u003cAccessTimeRounded /\u003e}\n        {sortType === 2 \u0026\u0026 \u003cSortByAlphaRounded /\u003e}\n      \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n\n      \u003cIconButton\n        size=\"small\"\n        color=\"inherit\"\n        title={t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.delayCheckUrl\")}\n        onClick={() =\u003e\n          onHeadState({ textState: textState === \"url\" ? null : \"url\" })\n        }\n      \u003e\n        {textState === \"url\" ? (\n          \u003cWifiTetheringRounded /\u003e\n        ) : (\n          \u003cWifiTetheringOffRounded /\u003e\n        )}\n      \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n\n      \u003cIconButton\n        size=\"small\"\n        color=\"inherit\"\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const useRenderList = \n\n [proxiesData, mode, refreshProxy]);\n\n  // 链式代理模式节点自动计算延迟\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (!isChainMode || !runtimeConfig) return;\n\n    const allProxies: IProxyItem[] = Object.values(\n      (runtimeConfig as any).proxies || {},\n    );\n    if (allProxies.length === 0) return;\n\n    // 设置组监听器，当有延迟更新时自动刷新\n    const groupListener = () =\u003e {\n      debugLog(\"[ChainMode] 延迟更新，刷新UI\");\n      refreshProxy();\n    };\n\n    delayManager.setGroupListener(\"chain-mode\", groupListener);\n\n    const calculateDelays = async () =\u003e {\n      try {\n        const timeout = 5000;\n        const proxyNames = allProxies.map((proxy) =\u003e proxy.name);\n\n        debugLog(&#96;[ChainMode] 开始计算 ${proxyNames.length} 个节点的延迟&#96;);\n\n        // 使用 delayManager 计算延迟，每个节点计算完成后会自动触发监听器刷新界面\n        delayManager.checkListDelay(proxyNames, \"chain-mode\", timeout);\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"Failed to calculate delays for chain mode:\", error);\n      }\n    };\n\n    // 延迟执行避免阻塞\n    const handle = setTimeout(calculateDelays, 100);\n\n    return () =\u003e {\n      clearTimeout(handle);\n      // 清理组监听器\n      delayManager.removeGroupListener(\"chain-mode\");\n    };\n  }, [isChainMode, runtimeConfig, refreshProxy]);\n\n  // 处理渲染列表\n  const renderList: IRenderItem[] = useMemo\n;\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "export const useRenderList = "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": " [proxiesData, mode, refreshProxy]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "  // 链式代理模式节点自动计算延迟"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "  useEffect(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "    if (!isChainMode || !runtimeConfig) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "    const allProxies: IProxyItem[] = Object.values("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "      (runtimeConfig as any).proxies || {},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "    );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "    if (allProxies.length === 0) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "    // 设置组监听器，当有延迟更新时自动刷新"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "    const groupListener = () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "      debugLog(\"[ChainMode] 延迟更新，刷新UI\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "      refreshProxy();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "    delayManager.setGroupListener(\"chain-mode\", groupListener);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "    const calculateDelays = async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "      try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "        const timeout = 5000;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "        const proxyNames = allProxies.map((proxy) =\u003e proxy.name);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "        debugLog(&#96;[ChainMode] 开始计算 ${proxyNames.length} 个节点的延迟&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "        // 使用 delayManager 计算延迟，每个节点计算完成后会自动触发监听器刷新界面"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "        delayManager.checkListDelay(proxyNames, \"chain-mode\", timeout);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "      } catch (error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "        console.error(\"Failed to calculate delays for chain mode:\", error);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "    // 延迟执行避免阻塞"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "    const handle = setTimeout(calculateDelays, 100);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "    return () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "      clearTimeout(handle);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "      // 清理组监听器"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "      delayManager.removeGroupListener(\"chain-mode\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "  }, [isChainMode, runtimeConfig, refreshProxy]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "  // 处理渲染列表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "  const renderList: IRenderItem[] = useMemo"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 462,
            "text": ";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 470,
            "text": ";"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyItem = \n\n          sx={{\n            justifyContent: \"flex-end\",\n            color: \"primary.main\",\n            display: isPreset ? \"none\" : \"\",\n          }}\n        \u003e\n          {delayValue === -2 \u0026\u0026 (\n            \u003cWidget\u003e\n              \u003cBaseLoading /\u003e\n            \u003c/Widget\u003e\n          )}\n\n          {!proxy.provider \u0026\u0026 delayValue !== -2 \u0026\u0026 (\n            // provider 的节点不支持检测\n            \u003cWidget\n              className=\"the-check\"\n              onClick={(e) =\u003e {\n                e.preventDefault();\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                onDelay();\n              }}\n              sx={({ palette }) =\u003e ({\n                display: \"none\", // hover 时显示\n                \":hover\": { bgcolor: alpha(palette.primary.main, 0.15) },\n              })}\n            \u003e\n              Check\n            \u003c/Widget\u003e\n          )}\n\n          {delayValue \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 (\n            // 显示延迟\n            \u003cWidget\n              className=\"the-delay\"\n              onClick={(e) =\u003e {\n                if (proxy.provider) return;\n                e.preventDefault();\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                onDelay();\n              }}\n              color={delayManager.formatDelayColor(delayValue, timeout)}\n              sx={({ palette }) =\u003e\n                !proxy.provider\n                  ? { \":hover\": { bgcolor: alpha(palette.primary.main, 0.15) } }\n                  : {}\n              }\n            \u003e\n              {delayManager.formatDelay(delayValue, timeout)}\n            \u003c/Widget\u003e\n          )}\n\n          {delayValue !== -2 \u0026\u0026 delayValue \u003c= 0 \u0026\u0026 selected \u0026\u0026 (\n            // 展示已选择的 icon\n            \u003cCheckCircleOutlineRounded\n              className=\"the-icon\"\n              sx={{ fontSize: 16 }}\n            /\u003e\n          )}\n        \u003c/ListItemIcon\u003e\n        {showManualIcon \u0026\u0026 group.type?.toLowerCase()?.includes(\"fallback\") \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003cspan className=\"the-pin\" title=\"manual\"\u003e\n            📌\n          \u003c/span\u003e\n;",
        "detailedLines": [

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "                if (proxy.provider) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "                e.preventDefault();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "                e.stopPropagation();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "                onDelay();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "              }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "              color={delayManager.formatDelayColor(delayValue, timeout)}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "              sx={({ palette }) =\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "                !proxy.provider"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "                  ? { \":hover\": { bgcolor: alpha(palette.primary.main, 0.15) } }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "                  : {}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "              }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "            \u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "              {delayManager.formatDelay(delayValue, timeout)}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "            \u003c/Widget\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "          )}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "          {delayValue !== -2 \u0026\u0026 delayValue \u003c= 0 \u0026\u0026 selected \u0026\u0026 ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "            // 展示已选择的 icon"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "            \u003cCheckCircleOutlineRounded"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "              className=\"the-icon\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "              sx={{ fontSize: 16 }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "            /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "          )}"
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyItem = \n\n\n  const delayValue = delayState.delay;\n\n  return (\n    \u003cListItem sx={sx}\u003e\n      \u003cListItemButton\n        dense\n        selected={selected}\n        onClick={() =\u003e onClick?.(proxy.name)}\n        sx={[\n          { borderRadius: 1, position: \"relative\" },\n          ({ palette: { mode, primary, success } }) =\u003e {\n            const bgcolor = mode === \"light\" ? \"#ffffff\" : \"#24252f\";\n            const selectColor = mode === \"light\" ? primary.main : primary.light;\n            const showDelay = delayValue \u003e 0;\n\n            // 判断节点是否测试成功（不是 T 或 E）\n            const delayText =\n              delayValue \u003e 0\n                ? delayManager.formatDelay(delayValue, timeout)\n                : \"\";\n            const isSuccess =\n              delayText !== \"T\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"E\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"-\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"testing\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"\";\n\n            // 成功的节点使用浅绿色背景\n            const finalBgcolor = isSuccess\n              ? alpha(success.main, 0.15)\n              : bgcolor;\n\n            return {\n              \"\u0026:hover .the-check\": { display: !showDelay ? \"block\" : \"none\" },\n              \"\u0026:hover .the-delay\": { display: showDelay ? \"block\" : \"none\" },\n              \"\u0026:hover .the-icon\": { display: \"none\" },\n              \"\u0026 .the-pin\": {\n                position: \"absolute\",\n                fontSize: \"12px\",\n                top: \"-5px\",\n                right: \"-5px\",\n              },\n              \"\u0026.Mui-selected\": {\n                width: &#96;calc(100% + 3px)&#96;,\n                marginLeft: &#96;-3px&#96;,\n                borderLeft: &#96;3px solid ${selectColor}&#96;,\n                bgcolor:\n                  mode === \"light\"\n                    ? alpha(primary.main, 0.15)\n                    : alpha(primary.main, 0.35),\n              },\n              backgroundColor: finalBgcolor,\n              marginBottom: \"8px\",\n              height: \"40px\",\n            };\n          },\n        ]}\n      \u003e\n        \u003cListItemText\n;",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import android.app.PendingIntent\n\nclass HealthCheckNotificationModule(service: Service) : Module\u003cUnit\u003e(service) {\n    private val notificationManager = NotificationManagerCompat.from(service)\n    \n    companion object {\n        const val CHANNEL_ID = \"health_check_channel\"\n        const val NOTIFICATION_ID = 1001\n        \n        fun createNotificationChannel(service: Service) {\n            NotificationManagerCompat.from(service).createNotificationChannel(\n                NotificationChannelCompat.Builder(\n                    CHANNEL_ID,\n                    NotificationManagerCompat.IMPORTANCE_DEFAULT\n                ).setName(service.getString(R.string.health_check_notification_channel))\n                    .setDescription(service.getString(R.string.health_check_notification_channel_description))\n                    .build()\n            )\n        }\n    }\n\n    override suspend fun run() = coroutineScope {\n        val events = Channel\u003cString\u003e(Channel.UNLIMITED)\n        \n        // Register callback\n        Bridge.nativeSubscribeHealthCheck(object : HealthCheckCallback {\n            override fun onHealthCheckTriggered(groupName: String) {\n                events.trySend(groupName)\n                ProxyGroupRefresh.notifyGroupChanged(groupName)\n            }\n        })\n        \n        while (true) {\n            select\u003cUnit\u003e {\n                events.onReceive { groupName -\u003e\n                    showNotification(groupName)\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    private fun showNotification(groupName: String) {\n        val notification = NotificationCompat.Builder(service, CHANNEL_ID)\n            ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const Widget = styled(Box)(() =\u003e ({\n  padding: \"3px 6px\",\n  fontSize: 14,\n  borderRadius: \"4px\",\n}));\n\nconst TypeBox = styled(\"span\")(({ theme }) =\u003e ({\n  display: \"inline-block\",\n  border: \"1px solid #ccc\",\n  borderColor: alpha(theme.palette.text.secondary, 0.36),\n  color: alpha(theme.palette.text.secondary, 0.42),\n  borderRadius: 4,\n  fontSize: 10,\n  marginRight: \"4px\",\n  padding: \"0 2px\",\n  lineHeight: 1.25,\n}));\n\nexport const ProxyItem = (props: Props) =\u003e {\n  const {\n    group,\n    proxy,\n    selected,\n    showManualIcon = false,\n    showType = true,\n    itemDisplayName,\n    sx,\n    onClick,\n  } = props;\n\n  // 诊断：打印图钉渲染条件\n  if (showManualIcon || selected) {\n    console.log(\"[ProxyItem] 渲染节点\", {\n      组名: group.name,\n      组类型: group.type,\n      节点名: proxy.name,\n      selected,\n      showManualIcon,\n      \"类型包含 fallback\": group.type?.toLowerCase()?.includes(\"fallback\"),\n      \"应该显示图钉\": showManualIcon \u0026\u0026 group.type?.toLowerCase()?.includes(\"fallback\"),\n    });\n  }\n\n  const presetList = [\"DIRECT\", \"REJECT\", \"REJECT-DROP\", \"PASS\", \"COMPATIBLE\"];\n  const isPreset = presetList.includes(proxy.name);\n  // -1/\u003c=0 为不显示，-2 为 loading\n  const [delayState, setDelayState] = useReducer(\n    (_: DelayUpdate, next: DelayUpdate) =\u003e next,\n    { delay: -1, updatedAt: 0 },\n  );\n  const timeout = getGroupDelayTimeout(group, showManualIcon);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isPreset) return;\n    delayManager.setListener(proxy.name, group.name, setDelayState);\n\n    return () =\u003e {\n      delayManager.removeListener(proxy.name, group.name);\n    };\n  }, [proxy.name, group.name, isPreset]);\n\n  const updateDelay = useCallback\n;\n;",

            "text": "      组名: group.name,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "      组类型: group.type,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "      节点名: proxy.name,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "      selected,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "      showManualIcon,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "      \"类型包含 fallback\": group.type?.toLowerCase()?.includes(\"fallback\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "      \"应该显示图钉\": showManualIcon \u0026\u0026 group.type?.toLowerCase()?.includes(\"fallback\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "  const presetList = [\"DIRECT\", \"REJECT\", \"REJECT-DROP\", \"PASS\", \"COMPATIBLE\"];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "  const isPreset = presetList.includes(proxy.name);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "  // -1/\u003c=0 为不显示，-2 为 loading"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "  const [delayState, setDelayState] = useReducer("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    (_: DelayUpdate, next: DelayUpdate) =\u003e next,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "    { delay: -1, updatedAt: 0 },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "  );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "  const timeout = getGroupDelayTimeout(group, showManualIcon);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "  useEffect(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "    if (isPreset) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "    delayManager.setListener(proxy.name, group.name, setDelayState);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "    return () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "      delayManager.removeListener(proxy.name, group.name);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "  }, [proxy.name, group.name, isPreset]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "  const updateDelay = useCallback"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": ";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": ";"
          }
        ],

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyItemMini = \n\n        )}\n      \u003c/Box\u003e\n      \u003cBox\n        sx={{ ml: 0.5, color: \"primary.main\", display: isPreset ? \"none\" : \"\" }}\n      \u003e\n        {delayValue === -2 \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003cWidget\u003e\n            \u003cBaseLoading /\u003e\n          \u003c/Widget\u003e\n        )}\n        {!proxy.provider \u0026\u0026 delayValue !== -2 \u0026\u0026 (\n          // provider 的节点不支持检测\n          \u003cWidget\n            className=\"the-check\"\n            onClick={(e) =\u003e {\n              e.preventDefault();\n              e.stopPropagation();\n              onDelay();\n            }}\n            sx={({ palette }) =\u003e ({\n              display: \"none\", // hover 时显示\n              \":hover\": { bgcolor: alpha(palette.primary.main, 0.15) },\n            })}\n          \u003e\n            Check\n          \u003c/Widget\u003e\n        )}\n\n        {delayValue \u003e= 0 \u0026\u0026 (\n          // 显示延迟\n          \u003cWidget\n            className=\"the-delay\"\n            onClick={(e) =\u003e {\n              if (proxy.provider) return;\n              e.preventDefault();\n              e.stopPropagation();\n              onDelay();\n            }}\n            color={delayManager.formatDelayColor(delayValue, timeout)}\n            sx={({ palette }) =\u003e\n              !proxy.provider\n                ? { \":hover\": { bgcolor: alpha(palette.primary.main, 0.15) } }\n                : {}\n            }\n          \u003e\n            {delayManager.formatDelay(delayValue, timeout)}\n          \u003c/Widget\u003e\n        )}\n        {proxy.type !== \"Direct\" \u0026\u0026\n          delayValue !== -2 \u0026\u0026\n          delayValue \u003c 0 \u0026\u0026\n          selected \u0026\u0026 (\n            // 展示已选择的 icon\n            \u003cCheckCircleOutlineRounded\n              className=\"the-icon\"\n              sx={{ fontSize: 16, mr: 0.5, display: \"block\" }}\n            /\u003e\n          )}\n      \u003c/Box\u003e\n      {showManualIcon \u0026\u0026 group.type?.toLowerCase()?.includes(\"fallback\") \u0026\u0026 (\n        \u003cspan className=\"the-pin\" title=\"manual\"\u003e\n          📌\n        \u003c/span\u003e\n      )}\n    \u003c/ListItemButton\u003e\n  );\n};\n\nconst Widget = styled(Box)(({ theme: { typography } }) =\u003e ({\n);",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyGroups = \nconst handleGroupSelect = \n\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleChangeProxy = useCallback(\n    (group: IProxyGroupItem, proxy: IProxyItem) =\u003e {\n      console.log(\"[UI] handleChangeProxy 被调用\", {\n        isChainMode,\n        组名: group.name,\n        组类型: group.type,\n        节点名: proxy.name,\n        时间戳: Date.now(),\n      });\n      \n      if (isChainMode) {\n        console.log(\"[UI] 链式模式，添加到 chain\");\n        // 使用函数式更新来避免状态延迟问题\n        setProxyChain((prev) =\u003e {\n          // 检查是否已经存在相同名称的代理，防止重复添加\n          if (prev.some((item) =\u003e item.name === proxy.name)) {\n            const warningMessage = t(\"proxies.page.chain.duplicateNode\");\n            setDuplicateWarning({\n              open: true,\n              message: warningMessage,\n            });\n            return prev; // 返回原来的状态，不做任何更改\n          }\n\n          // 安全获取延迟数据，如果没有延迟数据则设为 undefined\n          const delay =\n            proxy.history \u0026\u0026 proxy.history.length \u003e 0\n              ? proxy.history[proxy.history.length - 1].delay\n              : undefined;\n\n          const chainItem: ProxyChainItem = {\n            id: &#96;${proxy.name}_${Date.now()}&#96;,\n            name: proxy.name,\n            type: proxy.type,\n            delay: delay,\n          };\n\n          return [...prev, chainItem];\n        });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const groupTypeLower = group.type?.toLowerCase();\n      console.log(\"[UI] 组类型检查\", {\n        groupTypeLower,\n        \"是否为可切换类型\": [\"selector\", \"url-test\", \"fallback\"].includes(groupTypeLower ?? \"\"),\n      });\n      if (\n        !groupTypeLower ||\n        ![\"selector\", \"url-test\", \"fallback\"].includes(groupTypeLower)\n      ) {\n        console.warn(\"[UI] 组类型不支持切换，忽略\", { 组类型: group.type });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      console.log(\"[UI] 调用 handleProxyGroupChange\");\n    }\n;\n;",
        "detailedLines": [

          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "          // 检查是否已经存在相同名称的代理，防止重复添加"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "          if (prev.some((item) =\u003e item.name === proxy.name)) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "            const warningMessage = t(\"proxies.page.chain.duplicateNode\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "            setDuplicateWarning({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "              open: true,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417,
            "text": "              message: warningMessage,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "            });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "            return prev; // 返回原来的状态，不做任何更改"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "          }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422,
            "text": "          // 安全获取延迟数据，如果没有延迟数据则设为 undefined"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "          const delay ="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424,
            "text": "            proxy.history \u0026\u0026 proxy.history.length \u003e 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "              ? proxy.history[proxy.history.length - 1].delay"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426,
            "text": "              : undefined;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428,
            "text": "          const chainItem: ProxyChainItem = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "            id: &#96;${proxy.name}_${Date.now()}&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430,
            "text": "            name: proxy.name,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "            type: proxy.type,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432,
            "text": "            delay: delay,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "          };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "          return [...prev, chainItem];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 436,
            "text": "        });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": "        return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 439
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 440,
            "text": "      const groupTypeLower = group.type?.toLowerCase();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441,
            "text": "      console.log(\"[UI] 组类型检查\", {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 442,
            "text": "        groupTypeLower,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "        \"是否为可切换类型\": [\"selector\", \"url-test\", \"fallback\"].includes(groupTypeLower ?? \"\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,
            "text": "      });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445,
            "text": "      if ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "        !groupTypeLower ||"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447,
            "text": "        ![\"selector\", \"url-test\", \"fallback\"].includes(groupTypeLower)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448,
            "text": "      ) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449,
            "text": "        console.warn(\"[UI] 组类型不支持切换，忽略\", { 组类型: group.type });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 450,
            "text": "        return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 451,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 452
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 453,
            "text": "      console.log(\"[UI] 调用 handleProxyGroupChange\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 455,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 457,
            "text": ";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 840,
            "text": ";"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function getSignalIcon(delay: number): {\n  icon: React.ReactElement;\n  text: string;\n  color: string;\n} {\n  if (delay \u003c 0)\n    return { icon: \u003cSignalNone /\u003e, text: \"未测试\", color: \"text.secondary\" };\n  if (delay \u003e= 10000)\n    return { icon: \u003cSignalError /\u003e, text: \"超时\", color: \"error.main\" };\n  if (delay \u003e= 500)\n    return { icon: \u003cSignalWeak /\u003e, text: \"延迟较高\", color: \"error.main\" };\n  if (delay \u003e= 300)\n    return { icon: \u003cSignalMedium /\u003e, text: \"延迟中等\", color: \"warning.main\" };\n  if (delay \u003e= 200)\n    return { icon: \u003cSignalGood /\u003e, text: \"延迟良好\", color: \"info.main\" };\n  return { icon: \u003cSignalStrong /\u003e, text: \"延迟极佳\", color: \"success.main\" };\n}\n\nexport const CurrentProxyCard = () =\u003e {\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,

          },

            "isSignature": true,

          },

            "isSignature": true,

          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "  color: string;"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "} {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "  if (delay \u003c 0)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    return { icon: \u003cSignalNone /\u003e, text: \"未测试\", color: \"text.secondary\" };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "  if (delay \u003e= 10000)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "    return { icon: \u003cSignalError /\u003e, text: \"超时\", color: \"error.main\" };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "  if (delay \u003e= 500)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "  if (delay \u003e= 200)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "    return { icon: \u003cSignalGood /\u003e, text: \"延迟良好\", color: \"info.main\" };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "  return { icon: \u003cSignalStrong /\u003e, text: \"延迟极佳\", color: \"success.main\" };"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },

            "lineNumber": 109,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import {\n  AccessTimeRounded,\n  ChevronRight,\n  NetworkCheckRounded,\n  WifiOff as SignalError,\n  SignalWifi3Bar as SignalGood,\n  SignalWifi2Bar as SignalMedium,\n  SignalWifi0Bar as SignalNone,\n  SignalWifi4Bar as SignalStrong,\n  SignalWifi1Bar as SignalWeak,\n  SortByAlphaRounded,\n  SortRounded,\n} from \"@mui/icons-material\";\nimport {\n  Box,\n  Button,\n  Chip,\n  FormControl,\n  IconButton,\n  InputLabel,\n  MenuItem,\n  Select,\n  SelectChangeEvent,\n  Tooltip,\n  Typography,\n  alpha,\n  useTheme,\n} from \"@mui/material\";\nimport { useLockFn } from \"ahooks\";\nimport React, {\n  useCallback,\n  useEffect,\n  useMemo,\n  useRef,\n  useState,\n} from \"react\";\nimport { useTranslation } from \"react-i18next\";\nimport { useNavigate } from \"react-router\";\nimport { delayGroup, healthcheckProxyProvider } from \"tauri-plugin-mihomo-api\";\n\nimport { EnhancedCard } from \"@/components/home/enhanced-card\";\nimport { markManualDelayCheckStarted } from \"@/hooks/use-fallback-switch-notify\";\nimport { useProfiles } from \"@/hooks/use-profiles\";\nimport { useProxySelection } from \"@/hooks/use-proxy-selection\";\nimport { useVerge } from \"@/hooks/use-verge\";\nimport { useAppData } from \"@/providers/app-data-context\";\nimport delayManager, {\n  getGroupDelayTimeout,\n  DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS,\n} from \"@/services/delay\";\nimport { debugLog } from \"@/utils/debug\";\n\n// 本地存储的键名\nconst STORAGE_KEY_GROUP = \"clash-verge-selected-proxy-group\";\nconst STORAGE_KEY_PROXY = \"clash-verge-selected-proxy\";\nconst STORAGE_KEY_SORT_TYPE = \"clash-verge-proxy-sort-type\";\n\nconst AUTO_CHECK_DEFAULT_INTERVAL_MINUTES = 5;\nconst AUTO_CHECK_INITIAL_DELAY_MS = 100;\n\n// 代理节点信息接口\ninterface ProxyOption {\n  name: string;\n}\n\n// 排序类型: 默认 | 按延迟 | 按字母\ntype ProxySortType = 0 | 1 | 2;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package tunnel\n\nimport (\n\t\"sync\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/adapter/outboundgroup\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/tunnel\"\n)\n\nfunc HealthCheck(name string) {\n\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Request health check for &#96;%s&#96;: not found\", name)\n\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Request health check for &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", name, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// 测速时清空手动选择状态，使所有节点都不再是“手动选择”\n\tif clearable, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ClearManualSelectionAble); ok {\n\t\tclearable.ClearManualSelection()\n\t}\n\n\twg := \u0026sync.WaitGroup{}\n\n\tfor _, pr := range g.Providers() {\n\t\twg.Add(1)\n\n\t\tgo func(provider provider.ProxyProvider) {\n\t\t\tprovider.HealthCheck()\n\n\t\t\twg.Done()\n\t\t}(pr)\n\t}\n\n\twg.Wait()\n}\n\nfunc HealthCheckAll() {\n\tfor _, g := range QueryProxyGroupNames(false) {\n\t\tgo func(group string) {\n\t\t\tHealthCheck(group)\n\t\t}(g)\n\t}\n}\n\n// ClearAllManualSelections clears manual selection on all groups (Selector/Fallback).\n// Call when proxy stops or restarts so no node is shown as \"current\" until user selects again.\nfunc ClearAllManualSelections() {\n\tfor _, name := range QueryProxyGroupNames(false) {\n\t\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\n\t\tif p == nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif clearable, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ClearManualSelectionAble); ok {\n\t\t\tclearable.ClearManualSelection()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \nconst checkCurrentProxyDelay = \nasync (override?: {\n      groupName: string;\n      proxyName: string;\n      proxyRecord: any;\n    }) =\u003e {\n\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    [\n      isDirectMode,\n      refreshProxy,\n      state.proxyData.records,\n      state.selection.group,\n      state.selection.proxy,\n      sortType,\n      setDelaySortRefresh,\n      currentProfile?.selected,\n    ],\n  );\n\n  // 处理代理节点变更\n  const handleProxyChange = useCallback(\n    (event: SelectChangeEvent\u003cstring\u003e) =\u003e {\n      if (isDirectMode) return;\n\n      const newProxy = event.target.value;\n      const currentGroup = state.selection.group;\n      const previousProxy = state.selection.proxy;\n\n      debouncedSetState((prev: ProxyState) =\u003e ({\n        ...prev,\n        selection: {\n          ...prev.selection,\n          proxy: newProxy,\n        },\n        displayProxy: prev.proxyData.records[newProxy] || null,\n      }));\n\n      if (!isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 !isDirectMode) {\n        writeProfileScopedItem(STORAGE_KEY_PROXY, newProxy);\n      }\n\n      const skipConfigSave = isGlobalMode || isDirectMode;\n      handleSelectChange(currentGroup, previousProxy, skipConfigSave)(event);\n\n      // 手动切换节点后立即检测新节点延迟，以显示最新速度\n      const newProxyRecord = state.proxyData.records?.[newProxy] ?? null;\n      if (newProxyRecord) {\n        checkCurrentProxyDelay({\n          groupName: currentGroup,\n          proxyName: newProxy,\n          proxyRecord: newProxyRecord,\n        });\n      }\n    },\n    [\n      isDirectMode,\n      isGlobalMode,\n      state.selection,\n      state.proxyData.records,\n      debouncedSetState,\n      handleSelectChange,\n      writeProfileScopedItem,\n      checkCurrentProxyDelay,\n    ],\n  );\n\n  // 导航到代理页面\n  const goToProxies = useCallback(() =\u003e {\n    navigate(\"/proxies\");\n  }, [navigate]);\n\n  // 获取要显示的代理节点\n  const currentProxy = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    return state.displayProxy;\n  }, [state.displayProxy]);\n\n  // 获取当前节点的延迟（增加非空校验）\n;",

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="read_lints"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **read_lints**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (default)**_


当前唯一一个 lint 是项目对 `tauri-plugin-mihomo-api` 的依赖解析问题，不是这次改动引入的。

已按你的需求做了两件事：**延迟更新时自动刷新 UI**，以及 **选择节点后 5 秒内轮询刷新**，桌面端和 Android 都覆盖到了。

---

## 1. 延迟更新时自动刷新 UI（仅桌面端）

- **`clash-verge-rev/src/services/delay.ts`**
  - 增加**全局监听**（防抖 300ms）：任意节点调用 `setDelay`（单节点测速或批量测速完成）后，会触发一次全局回调。
  - 新增：`setGlobalListener` / `removeGlobalListener`。

- **`clash-verge-rev/src/providers/app-data-provider.tsx`**
  - 在 AppDataProvider 里注册：全局监听回调里执行 `refreshProxy().catch(() => {})`。
  - 效果：**只要有一次延迟更新（测速/健康检测完成），UI 会在防抖后自动拉一次代理数据，节点上的延迟会更新**，无需退出代理或做其他操作。

---

## 2. 选择节点后连续 5 秒轮询刷新（桌面 + Android）

- **桌面端 `clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-proxy-selection.ts`**
  - 在原有 400ms / 900ms / 1800ms 三次刷新之后，再在 **1s、2s、3s、4s、5s** 各触发一次 `onSuccess`（即 `refreshProxy()`）。
  - 效果：**手动切节点后 5 秒内，每秒拉一次代理数据**，测速或健康检测结果会在这段时间内陆续反映到 UI。

- **Android `app/src/main/java/com/github/kr328/clash/ProxyActivity.kt`**
  - 在 `ProxyDesign.Request.Select` 的 `launch` 里：先做一次当前组的 `reloadGroup()`，然后 **每隔 1 秒再执行一次 `reloadGroup()`，共 5 次**（即 1s、2s、3s、4s、5s 各刷新一次该组）。
  - 效果：**在安卓上选节点后，该组会在 5 秒内被轮询刷新 6 次**（1 次立即 + 5 次间隔 1s），延迟/测速结果会及时更新到界面。

---

## 行为小结

| 场景 | 桌面端 | Android |
|------|--------|--------|
| 任意测速/健康检测完成 | 防抖后自动 `refreshProxy`，列表延迟会更新 | 已有 `ProxyGroupRefresh`：健康检查触发时 core 通知 → UI 刷新该组 |
| 手动选择节点后 | 立即 + 400/900/1800ms 刷新，再 1s～5s 每秒刷新一次 | 立即刷新该组，再 1s～5s 每秒刷新该组一次 |

这样，**桌面端**：延迟更新会触发一次刷新，选节点后还有 5 秒轮询；**安卓端**：选节点后也有 5 秒轮询，健康检查触发的刷新沿用现有 `ProxyGroupRefresh`。测速成功后，两端的节点延迟都会在 UI 上更新。

---

_**User**_

不错，但是如果失败的话，貌似也不会更新最新选择的节点。比如现在如果手动选择节点测速失败，然后会更换节点，但是UI并不会刷新，还是保留在当前的节点上

---

_**Agent (default)**_


查找核心在测速失败并自动切换节点时如何通知前端，以及前端是否据此刷新 UI。


_**Agent (default)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="ripgrep_raw_search">

{
  "caseInsensitive": false,
  "glob": "*.{ts,tsx,rs}",
  "outputMode": "content",
  "path": "clash-verge-rev",
  "pattern": "fallback|FallbackNotify|proxy.*change|group.*change|health.*fail"
}

_**Agent (default)**_


发现问题：手动选择 A 后进入 10 秒冷却；若测速失败核心切到 B，检测到切换时因在冷却期内未同步 `profile.selected`，导致 UI 仍显示 A。修复计划：检测到核心切换时始终将 `profile.selected` 同步为核心当前节点（仅冷却期内不弹通知）；并延长选择后轮询以更可靠地捕获切换。

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (default)**_


已按你的需求改了两点，保证「手动选择节点测速失败、核心自动切走」时，UI 会跟核心一致并显示最新节点。

---

## 1. 检测到核心切换时，始终同步 UI（不再受冷却期限制）

**文件：`clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-fallback-switch-notify.ts`**

- **原逻辑**：在「手动选择」等冷却期内检测到 fallback/url-test 切换时，**不**清空该组的手动选择，所以 `profile.selected` 仍是失败节点 A，UI 看起来还停在 A。
- **现逻辑**：只要检测到「该组当前节点从 A 变为 B」（即核心已切走），**一律**从 `profile.selected` 里清空该组的手动选择，不再判断是否在冷却期。
  - 这样 UI 会以核心的 `group.now`（B）为准，显示为当前节点，且该组不再有「手动选择」图钉。
- **冷却期只影响通知**：是否弹「fallback 切换」的系统通知仍然受冷却期控制（避免刚手动选完就弹「节点已自动切换」），但 **profile 同步和界面展示不再受冷却期影响**。

效果：手动选了 A → 测速失败 → 核心切到 B 后，下一次刷新拿到新数据时，会清空该组的手动选择并刷新界面，UI 会显示当前节点 B。

---

## 2. 选择后轮询时间延长到 10 秒

**文件：`clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-proxy-selection.ts`**

- 选择节点后的轮询从 **5 次（1～5s）** 改为 **10 次（1～10s）**，即 1s、2s、…、10s 各刷新一次代理数据。
- 测速或健康检查较慢时，核心可能在 5s 后才切走，延长轮询能更大概率在 10s 内拿到核心最新状态，从而触发上面的「检测切换 → 同步 profile → 刷新 UI」。

---

## 小结

| 场景 | 之前 | 现在 |
|------|------|------|
| 手动选 A，测速失败，核心切到 B | 冷却期内不更新 `profile.selected`，UI 仍显示 A | 检测到切换后**始终**清空该组手动选择，UI 显示核心当前节点 B |
| 刷新时机 | 选择后只轮询 5s | 选择后轮询 10s，更容易在测速失败后拿到核心新状态 |

这样在「手动选择节点测速失败、核心自动更换节点」时，界面会及时更新为当前实际使用的节点。

---

_**User**_

电脑端手动测速，是否超时使用的是 selected timeout吗

---

_**Agent (default)**_


查找桌面端手动测速时使用的超时（timeout）逻辑。


_**Agent (default)**_

_**Agent (default)**_


根据代码，电脑端逻辑是这样的：

---

## 结论概览

| 场景 | 是否用 selectedTimeout |
|------|------------------------|
| **单节点测速**（当前节点自动检测 / 点击某个节点测速） | **会**：当该节点是「手动选择」时用 `selectedTimeout` |
| **测全部延迟**（点击整组的「测速」按钮） | **不会**：只用组的 `timeout` |

---

## 1. 单节点测速 → 会用 selectedTimeout

- **`delay.ts`** 里 `getGroupDelayTimeout` 的规则是：  
  - 若 `isManualSelection === true` 且组有 `selectedTimeout`，则用 **selectedTimeout**；  
  - 否则用 **timeout**。

- **使用处**：
  - **当前节点自动测速**（`current-proxy-card.tsx` 的 `checkCurrentProxyDelay`）：  
    `const timeout = getGroupDelayTimeout(groupRecord, isManualSelection);`  
    → 当前节点为手动选择时，用 selectedTimeout。
  - **代理列表里点某个节点测速**（`proxy-item.tsx` / `proxy-item-mini.tsx`）：  
    `const timeout = getGroupDelayTimeout(group, showManualIcon);`  
    → 该节点为手动选择（showManualIcon）时，用 selectedTimeout。

所以：**单节点、且该节点是手动选择时，超时用的是 selectedTimeout**。

---

## 2. 测全部延迟 → 不用 selectedTimeout

- **代理页整组测速**（`proxy-groups.tsx` 的 `handleCheckAll`）：  
  `const timeout = group?.timeout ?? 5000;`  
  → 只用组的 **timeout**。

- **首页当前代理卡里的「测速」**（`current-proxy-card.tsx` 的 `handleCheckDelay`）：  
  `const timeout = group?.timeout ?? DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS;`  
  → 同样只用组的 **timeout**。

这里都没有传「是否手动选择」，也没有用 `getGroupDelayTimeout`，所以**测全部时不会用 selectedTimeout**。

---

## 总结

- **电脑端「手动测速」里，只有「单节点测速」会在该节点为手动选择时使用 selectedTimeout。**
- **「测全部延迟」**（整组测速按钮）**一律用组的 timeout，不用 selectedTimeout**。  
如果你希望「测全部」也按 selectedTimeout 来判超时，需要在这两处把 `timeout` 改成通过 `getGroupDelayTimeout` 取（并决定对整组用哪种“是否手动选择”的语义）。

---

_**User**_

我现在需要当我选定一个节点之后，就固定使用这个节点，即使节点连接失败等等都不触发 fallback。只有手动进行 group 测速之后，才触发 fallback 并清空手动选择节点

---

_**Agent (default)**_


查找核心（core）对手动选择与 fallback/健康检查的处理逻辑。


_**Agent (default)**_

{

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (f *Fallback) Set(name string) error {\n\tvar p C.Proxy\n\tfor _, proxy := range f.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tif proxy.Name() == name {\n\t\t\tp = proxy\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"proxy not exist\")\n\t}\n\n\t// 保存上一次的手动选择，用于健康检测失败时回滚\n\tif f.selected != \"\" \u0026\u0026 f.selected != name {\n\t\tf.previousSelected = f.selected\n\t}\n\n\t// 立即切换到用户选择的节点\n\tf.selected = name\n\n\t// 异步健康检测：使用 selectedTimeout（手动选择专用超时）\n\tgo func() {\n\t\ttimeoutMs := f.selectedTimeout\n\t\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\n\t\t\ttimeoutMs = f.TestTimeout\n\t\t}\n\t\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\n\t\t\ttimeoutMs = 5000\n\t\t}\n\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(timeoutMs))\n\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\texpectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](f.expectedStatus)\n\t\t_, err := p.URLTest(ctx, f.testUrl, expectedStatus)\n\n\t\t// 健康检测失败：回滚到上一次选择的节点或清空（使用 fallback 自动选择）\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tif f.selected == name { // 确保没有被其他操作修改\n\t\t\t\tif f.previousSelected != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\t// 检查上一次选择的节点是否仍然可用\n\t\t\t\t\tfor _, proxy := range f.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif proxy.Name() == f.previousSelected {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tf.selected = f.previousSelected\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tf.selected = \"\" // 上一个也不可用，使用 fallback 自动选择\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tf.selected = \"\" // 没有上一次选择，使用 fallback 自动选择\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) ForceSet(name string) {\n\tf.selected = name\n}\n\n// NowIsManual implements NowIsManualAble.\nfunc (f *Fallback) NowIsManual() bool {\n\treturn f.selected != \"\"\n}\n\n// ClearManualSelection clears the fixed selected node so the group auto-picks first alive.\nfunc (f *Fallback) ClearManualSelection() {\n\tf.selected = \"\"\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (f *Fallback) findAliveProxy(touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\tproxies := f.GetProxies(touch)\n\ttimeoutMs := f.TestTimeout\n\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\n\t\ttimeoutMs = 5000\n\t}\n\n\t// 手动选择模式：无条件返回用户选择的节点\n\t// 健康检测由 Set() 的异步 goroutine 负责，这里不阻止用户的选择\n\tif len(f.selected) \u003e 0 {\n\t\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\n\t\t\tif proxy.Name() == f.selected {\n\t\t\t\treturn proxy // 直接返回，不检查延迟或健康状态\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\t// 选择的节点不存在于列表中（可能被移除），清空选择\n\t\tf.selected = \"\"\n\t}\n\n\t// 自动模式：返回第一个可用的节点\n\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\n\t\t// Only use proxy if alive and delay is within group timeout\n\t\tif proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl) \u0026\u0026 proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(f.testUrl) \u003c= uint16(timeoutMs) {\n\t\t\treturn proxy\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// No proxy is alive within timeout: use the one with minimum delay (least bad) instead of always the first\n\tvar best C.Proxy\n\tminDelay := uint16(0xffff)\n\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\n\t\td := proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(f.testUrl)\n\t\tif d \u003c minDelay {\n\t\t\tminDelay = d\n\t\t\tbest = proxy\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif best != nil {\n\t\treturn best\n\t}\n\treturn proxies[0]\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) Set(name string) error",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package tunnel\n\nimport (\n\t\"sync\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/adapter/outboundgroup\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/tunnel\"\n)\n\nfunc HealthCheck(name string) {\n\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Request health check for &#96;%s&#96;: not found\", name)\n\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Request health check for &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", name, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// 测速时清空手动选择状态，使所有节点都不再是“手动选择”\n\tif clearable, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ClearManualSelectionAble); ok {\n\t\tclearable.ClearManualSelection()\n\t}\n\n\twg := \u0026sync.WaitGroup{}\n\n\tfor _, pr := range g.Providers() {\n\t\twg.Add(1)\n\n\t\tgo func(provider provider.ProxyProvider) {\n\t\t\tprovider.HealthCheck()\n\n\t\t\twg.Done()\n\t\t}(pr)\n\t}\n\n\twg.Wait()\n}\n\nfunc HealthCheckAll() {\n\tfor _, g := range QueryProxyGroupNames(false) {\n\t\tgo func(group string) {\n\t\t\tHealthCheck(group)\n\t\t}(g)\n\t}\n}\n\n// ClearAllManualSelections clears manual selection on all groups (Selector/Fallback).\n// Call when proxy stops or restarts so no node is shown as \"current\" until user selects again.\nfunc ClearAllManualSelections() {\n\tfor _, name := range QueryProxyGroupNames(false) {\n\t\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\n\t\tif p == nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif clearable, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ClearManualSelectionAble); ok {\n\t\t\tclearable.ClearManualSelection()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

            "text": "\twg := \u0026sync.WaitGroup{}"
          },

            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\tfor _, pr := range g.Providers() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\t\twg.Add(1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\t\tgo func(provider provider.ProxyProvider) {"
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\t\t\twg.Done()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\t\t}(pr)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\t}"
          },

            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\twg.Wait()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "func HealthCheckAll() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\tfor _, g := range QueryProxyGroupNames(false) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\tgo func(group string) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\t\t\tHealthCheck(group)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\t\t}(g)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "// ClearAllManualSelections clears manual selection on all groups (Selector/Fallback)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "// Call when proxy stops or restarts so no node is shown as \"current\" until user selects again."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "func ClearAllManualSelections() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\tfor _, name := range QueryProxyGroupNames(false) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\t\tif p == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\t\tcontinue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\t\tif clearable, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ClearManualSelectionAble); ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\t\t\tclearable.ClearManualSelection()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package outboundgroup\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/callback\"\n\tN \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/net\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\tP \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n)\n\ntype Fallback struct {\n\t*GroupBase\n\tdisableUDP       bool\n\ttestUrl          string\n\tselected         string\n\tpreviousSelected string // 上一次手动选择的节点，用于健康检测失败时回滚\n\texpectedStatus   string\n\tselectedTimeout  int // ms, for selected node only; 0 = use same as normal (AliveForTestUrl)\n\tHidden           bool\n\tIcon             string\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) Now() string {\n\tproxy := f.findAliveProxy(false)\n\treturn proxy.Name()\n}\n\n// DialContext implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (f *Fallback) DialContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (C.Conn, error) {\n\tproxy := f.findAliveProxy(true)\n\tc, err := proxy.DialContext(ctx, metadata)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tc.AppendToChains(f)\n\t} else {\n\t\tf.onDialFailed(proxy.Type(), err, f.healthCheck)\n\t}\n\n\tif N.NeedHandshake(c) {\n\t\tc = callback.NewFirstWriteCallBackConn(c, func(err error) {\n\t\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tf.onDialSuccess()\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tf.onDialFailed(proxy.Type(), err, f.healthCheck)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\treturn c, err\n}\n\n// ListenPacketContext implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (f *Fallback) ListenPacketContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (C.PacketConn, error) {\n\tproxy := f.findAliveProxy(true)\n\tpc, err := proxy.ListenPacketContext(ctx, metadata)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tpc.AppendToChains(f)\n\t}\n\n\treturn pc, err\n}\n\n// SupportUDP implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (f *Fallback) SupportUDP() bool {\n\tif f.disableUDP {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tproxy := f.findAliveProxy(false)\n\treturn proxy.SupportUDP()\n}\n\n// IsL3Protocol implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (f *Fallback) IsL3Protocol(metadata *C.Metadata) bool {\n\treturn f.findAliveProxy(false).IsL3Protocol(metadata)\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (s *Selector) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\n\tall := []string{}\n\tfor _, proxy := range s.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tall = append(all, proxy.Name())\n\t}\n\t// When testurl is the default value\n\t// do not append a value to ensure that the web dashboard follows the settings of the dashboard\n\tvar url string\n\tif s.testUrl != C.DefaultTestURL {\n\t\turl = s.testUrl\n\t}\n\n\treturn json.Marshal(map[string]any{\n\t\t\"type\":    s.Type().String(),\n\t\t\"now\":     s.Now(),\n\t\t\"all\":     all,\n\t\t\"testUrl\": url,\n\t\t\"hidden\":  s.Hidden,\n\t\t\"icon\":    s.Icon,\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc (s *Selector) Now() string {\n\treturn s.selectedProxy(false).Name()\n}\n\nfunc (s *Selector) Set(name string) error {\n\tvar selectedProxy C.Proxy\n\tfor _, proxy := range s.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tif proxy.Name() == name {\n\t\t\tselectedProxy = proxy\n\t\t\ts.selected = name\n\t\t\ts.manualSelected = true\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif selectedProxy == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"proxy not exist\")\n\t}\n\n\t// 异步测速：手动选择的节点在后台测速，不阻塞返回（与安卓端体验对齐）\n\tif s.selectedTimeout \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 s.testUrl != \"\" {\n\t\tgo func() {\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(s.selectedTimeout))\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\texpectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](s.expectedStatus)\n\t\t\t_, _ = selectedProxy.URLTest(ctx, s.testUrl, expectedStatus)\n\t\t}()\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Selector) ForceSet(name string) {\n\ts.selected = name\n\ts.manualSelected = true\n}\n\n// NowIsManual implements NowIsManualAble.\nfunc (s *Selector) NowIsManual() bool {\n\treturn s.manualSelected\n}\n\n// ClearManualSelection resets selection to the first proxy so no node is \"manually selected\".\nfunc (s *Selector) ClearManualSelection() {\n\tproxies := s.GetProxies(false)\n\tif len(proxies) \u003e 0 {\n\t\ts.selected = proxies[0].Name()\n\t}\n\ts.manualSelected = false\n}\n\n// Unwrap implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (s *Selector) Unwrap(metadata *C.Metadata, touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\treturn s.selectedProxy(touch)\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func QueryProxyGroup(name string, sortMode SortMode, uiSubtitlePattern *regexp2.Regexp) *ProxyGroup {\n\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Query group &#96;%s&#96;: not found\", name)\n\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Query group &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", name, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tproxies := convertProxies(g.Proxies(), uiSubtitlePattern)\n\t// \tproxies := collectProviders(g.Providers(), uiSubtitlePattern)\n\n\tswitch sortMode {\n\tcase Title:\n\t\twrapper := \u0026sortableProxyList{\n\t\t\tlist: proxies,\n\t\t\tless: func(a, b *Proxy) bool {\n\t\t\t\treturn strings.Compare(a.Title, b.Title) \u003c 0\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsort.Sort(wrapper)\n\tcase Delay:\n\t\twrapper := \u0026sortableProxyList{\n\t\t\tlist: proxies,\n\t\t\tless: func(a, b *Proxy) bool {\n\t\t\t\treturn a.Delay \u003c b.Delay\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsort.Sort(wrapper)\n\tcase Default:\n\tdefault:\n\t}\n\n\tnowIsManual := false\n\tif manualable, ok := g.(outboundgroup.NowIsManualAble); ok {\n\t\tnowIsManual = manualable.NowIsManual()\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026ProxyGroup{\n\t\tType:        g.Type().String(),\n\t\tNow:         g.Now(),\n\t\tNowIsManual: nowIsManual,\n\t\tProxies:     proxies,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc PatchSelector(selector, name string) bool {\n\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[selector]\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: not found\", selector)\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", selector, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\ts, ok := g.(outboundgroup.SelectAble)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", selector, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif err := s.Set(name); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: %s\", selector, err.Error())\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Infoln(\"Patch selector %s -\u003e %s\", selector, name)\n\n\tcloseConnByGroup(selector)\n\n\treturn true\n}\n\nfunc convertProxies(proxies []C.Proxy, uiSubtitlePattern *regexp2.Regexp)",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package main\n\n//#include \"bridge.h\"\nimport \"C\"\n\nimport (\n\t\"unsafe\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/app\"\n\t\"cfa/native/tunnel\"\n)\n\n//export queryTunnelState\nfunc queryTunnelState() *C.char {\n\tmode := tunnel.QueryMode()\n\n\tresponse := \u0026struct {\n\t\tMode string &#96;json:\"mode\"&#96;\n\t}{mode}\n\n\treturn marshalJson(response)\n}\n\n//export queryNow\nfunc queryNow(upload, download *C.uint64_t) {\n\tup, down := tunnel.Now()\n\n\t*upload = C.uint64_t(up)\n\t*download = C.uint64_t(down)\n}\n\n//export queryTotal\nfunc queryTotal(upload, download *C.uint64_t) {\n\tup, down := tunnel.Total()\n\n\t*upload = C.uint64_t(up)\n\t*download = C.uint64_t(down)\n}\n\n//export queryGroupNames\nfunc queryGroupNames(excludeNotSelectable C.int) *C.char {\n\treturn marshalJson(tunnel.QueryProxyGroupNames(excludeNotSelectable != 0))\n}\n\n//export queryGroup\nfunc queryGroup(name C.c_string, sortMode C.c_string) *C.char {\n\tn := C.GoString(name)\n\ts := C.GoString(sortMode)\n\n\tmode := tunnel.Default\n\n\tswitch s {\n\tcase \"Title\":\n\t\tmode = tunnel.Title\n\tcase \"Delay\":\n\t\tmode = tunnel.Delay\n\t}\n\n\tresponse := tunnel.QueryProxyGroup(n, mode, app.SubtitlePattern())\n\n\tif response == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn marshalJson(response)\n}\n\n//export healthCheck\nfunc healthCheck(completable unsafe.Pointer, name C.c_string) {\n\tgo func(name string) {\n\t\ttunnel.HealthCheck(name)\n\n\t\tC.complete(completable, nil)\n\t}(C.GoString(name))\n}\n\n//export healthCheckAll\nfunc healthCheckAll() {\n\ttunnel.HealthCheckAll()\n}\n\n//export patchSelector\nfunc patchSelector(selector, name C.c_string) C.int {\n\ts := C.GoString(selector)\n\tn := C.GoString(name)\n\n\tif tunnel.PatchSelector(s, n) {\n\t\treturn 1\n\t}\n\n\treturn 0\n}\n\n//export clearAllManualSelections\nfunc clearAllManualSelections() {\n\ttunnel.ClearAllManualSelections()\n}\n\n//export queryProviders\nfunc queryProviders() *C.char {\n\treturn marshalJson(tunnel.QueryProviders())\n}\n\n//export queryConnections\nfunc queryConnections() *C.char {\n\treturn marshalJson(queryConnectionsSnapshot())\n}\n\n//export closeConnection\nfunc closeConnection(id C.c_string) C.int {\n\tif closeConnectionByID(C.GoString(id)) {\n\t\treturn 1\n\t}\n\treturn 0\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.core.bridge\n\nimport android.os.Build\nimport android.os.ParcelFileDescriptor\nimport androidx.annotation.Keep\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.Global\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.log.Log\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.CompletableDeferred\nimport java.io.File\n\n@Keep\nobject Bridge {\n    external fun nativeReset()\n    external fun nativeForceGc()\n    external fun nativeSuspend(suspend: Boolean)\n    external fun nativeQueryTunnelState(): String\n    external fun nativeQueryTrafficNow(): Long\n    external fun nativeQueryTrafficTotal(): Long\n    external fun nativeNotifyDnsChanged(dnsList: String)\n    external fun nativeNotifyTimeZoneChanged(name: String, offset: Int)\n    external fun nativeNotifyInstalledAppChanged(uidList: String)\n    external fun nativeStartTun(fd: Int, stack: String, gateway: String, portal: String, dns: String, cb: TunInterface)\n    external fun nativeStopTun()\n    external fun nativeStartHttp(listenAt: String): String?\n    external fun nativeStopHttp()\n    external fun nativeQueryGroupNames(excludeNotSelectable: Boolean): String\n    external fun nativeQueryGroup(name: String, sort: String): String?\n    external fun nativeHealthCheck(completable: CompletableDeferred\u003cUnit\u003e, name: String)\n    external fun nativeHealthCheckAll()\n    external fun nativePatchSelector(selector: String, name: String): Boolean\n    external fun nativeClearAllManualSelections()\n    external fun nativeFetchAndValid(\n        completable: FetchCallback,\n        path: String,\n        url: String,\n        force: Boolean\n    )\n\n    external fun nativeLoad(completable: CompletableDeferred\u003cUnit\u003e, path: String)\n    external fun nativeQueryProviders(): String\n    external fun nativeUpdateProvider(\n        completable: CompletableDeferred\u003cUnit\u003e,\n        type: String,\n        name: String\n    )\n\n    external fun nativeReadOverride(slot: Int): String\n    external fun nativeWriteOverride(slot: Int, content: String)\n    external fun nativeClearOverride(slot: Int)\n    external fun nativeQueryConfiguration(): String",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package outboundgroup\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\tP \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n)\n\ntype ProxyGroup interface {\n\tC.ProxyAdapter\n\n\tProviders() []P.ProxyProvider\n\tProxies() []C.Proxy\n\tNow() string\n\tTouch()\n\n\tURLTest(ctx context.Context, url string, expectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]) (mp map[string]uint16, err error)\n}\n\nvar _ ProxyGroup = (*Fallback)(nil)\nvar _ ProxyGroup = (*LoadBalance)(nil)\nvar _ ProxyGroup = (*URLTest)(nil)\nvar _ ProxyGroup = (*Selector)(nil)\n\ntype SelectAble interface {\n\tSet(string) error\n\tForceSet(name string)\n}\n\n// ClearManualSelectionAble is implemented by groups that remember a manual selection.\n// When health check (测速) is triggered, clearing means \"all nodes not manually selected\".\ntype ClearManualSelectionAble interface {\n\tClearManualSelection()\n}\n\n// NowIsManualAble is implemented by groups that can have a \"manual\" current selection.\n// When false, UI should not show any node as \"current\"; traffic still uses first/auto node.\ntype NowIsManualAble interface {\n\tNowIsManual() bool\n}\n\nvar _ SelectAble = (*Fallback)(nil)\nvar _ SelectAble = (*URLTest)(nil)\nvar _ SelectAble = (*Selector)(nil)\nvar _ ClearManualSelectionAble = (*Selector)(nil)\nvar _ ClearManualSelectionAble = (*Fallback)(nil)\nvar _ NowIsManualAble = (*Selector)(nil)\nvar _ NowIsManualAble = (*Fallback)(nil)",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (u *URLTest) ListenPacketContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (C.PacketConn, error) {\n\tproxy := u.fast(true)\n\tpc, err := proxy.ListenPacketContext(ctx, metadata)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tpc.AppendToChains(u)\n\t} else {\n\t\tu.onDialFailed(proxy.Type(), err, u.healthCheck)\n\t}\n\n\treturn pc, err\n}\n\n// Unwrap implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (u *URLTest) Unwrap(metadata *C.Metadata, touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\treturn u.fast(touch)\n}\n\nfunc (u *URLTest) healthCheck() {\n\tu.fastSingle.Reset()\n\tu.GroupBase.healthCheck()\n\tu.fastSingle.Reset()\n}\n\nfunc (u *URLTest) fast(touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\telm, _, shared := u.fastSingle.Do(func() (C.Proxy, error) {\n\t\tproxies := u.GetProxies(touch)\n\t\tif u.selected != \"\" {\n\t\t\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\n\t\t\t\tif !proxy.AliveForTestUrl(u.testUrl) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif proxy.Name() == u.selected {\n\t\t\t\t\tu.fastNode = proxy\n\t\t\t\t\treturn proxy, nil\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfast := proxies[0]\n\t\tminDelay := fast.LastDelayForTestUrl(u.testUrl)\n\t\tfastNotExist := true\n\n\t\tfor _, proxy := range proxies[1:] {\n\t\t\tif u.fastNode != nil \u0026\u0026 proxy.Name() == u.fastNode.Name() {\n\t\t\t\tfastNotExist = false\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !proxy.AliveForTestUrl(u.testUrl) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tdelay := proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(u.testUrl)\n\t\t\tif delay \u003c minDelay {\n\t\t\t\tfast = proxy\n\t\t\t\tminDelay = delay\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t}\n\t\t// tolerance\n\t\tif u.fastNode == nil || fastNotExist || !u.fastNode.AliveForTestUrl(u.testUrl) || u.fastNode.LastDelayForTestUrl(u.testUrl) \u003e fast.LastDelayForTestUrl(u.testUrl)+u.tolerance {\n\t\t\tu.fastNode = fast\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn u.fastNode, nil\n\t})\n\tif shared \u0026\u0026 touch { // a shared fastSingle.Do() may cause providers untouched, so we touch them again\n\t\tu.Touch()\n\t}\n\n\treturn elm\n}\n\n// SupportUDP implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (u *URLTest) SupportUDP() bool {\n\tif u.disableUDP {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\treturn u.fast(false).SupportUDP()\n}\n\n// IsL3Protocol implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (u *URLTest) IsL3Protocol(metadata *C.Metadata) bool {\n\treturn u.fast(false).IsL3Protocol(metadata)\n}\n\n// MarshalJSON implements C.ProxyAdapter",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package outboundgroup\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\tP \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n)\n\ntype Selector struct {\n\t*GroupBase\n\tdisableUDP       bool\n\tselected         string\n\tmanualSelected   bool // true only after user or persist Set(); cleared by ClearManualSelection/health/stop\n\ttestUrl          string\n\texpectedStatus   string\n\tselectedTimeout  int // ms, for manual-selected node delay test; 0 = skip\n\tHidden           bool\n\tIcon             string\n}\n\n// DialContext implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (s *Selector) DialContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (C.Conn, error) {\n\tc, err := s.selectedProxy(true).DialContext(ctx, metadata)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tc.AppendToChains(s)\n\t}\n\treturn c, err\n}\n\n// ListenPacketContext implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (s *Selector) ListenPacketContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (C.PacketConn, error) {\n\tpc, err := s.selectedProxy(true).ListenPacketContext(ctx, metadata)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tpc.AppendToChains(s)\n\t}\n\treturn pc, err\n}\n\n// SupportUDP implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (s *Selector) SupportUDP() bool {\n\tif s.disableUDP {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\treturn s.selectedProxy(false).SupportUDP()\n}\n\n// IsL3Protocol implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (s *Selector) IsL3Protocol(metadata *C.Metadata) bool {\n\treturn s.selectedProxy(false).IsL3Protocol(metadata)\n}\n\n// MarshalJSON implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (s *Selector) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\n\tall := []string{}\n\tfor _, proxy := range s.GetProxies(false)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (lb *LoadBalance) DialContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (c C.Conn, err error) {\n\tproxy := lb.Unwrap(metadata, true)\n\tc, err = proxy.DialContext(ctx, metadata)\n\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tc.AppendToChains(lb)\n\t} else {\n\t\tlb.onDialFailed(proxy.Type(), err, lb.healthCheck)\n\t}\n\n\tif N.NeedHandshake(c) {\n\t\tc = callback.NewFirstWriteCallBackConn(c, func(err error) {\n\t\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tlb.onDialSuccess()\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tlb.onDialFailed(proxy.Type(), err, lb.healthCheck)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\treturn\n}\n\n// ListenPacketContext implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (lb *LoadBalance) ListenPacketContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (pc C.PacketConn, err error) {\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tpc.AppendToChains(lb)\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tproxy := lb.Unwrap(metadata, true)\n\treturn proxy.ListenPacketContext(ctx, metadata)\n}\n\n// SupportUDP implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (lb *LoadBalance) SupportUDP() bool {\n\treturn !lb.disableUDP\n}\n\n// IsL3Protocol implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (lb *LoadBalance) IsL3Protocol(metadata *C.Metadata) bool {\n\treturn lb.Unwrap(metadata, false).IsL3Protocol(metadata)\n}\n\nfunc strategyRoundRobin(url string) strategyFn {\n\tidx := 0\n\tidxMutex := sync.Mutex{}\n\treturn func(proxies []C.Proxy, metadata *C.Metadata, touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\t\tidxMutex.Lock()\n\t\tdefer idxMutex.Unlock()\n\n\t\ti := 0\n\t\tlength := len(proxies)\n\n\t\tif touch {\n\t\t\tdefer func() {\n\t\t\t\tidx = (idx + i) % length\n\t\t\t}()\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor ; i \u003c length; i++ {\n\t\t\tid := (idx + i) % length\n\t\t\tproxy := proxies[id]\n\t\t\tif proxy.AliveForTestUrl(url) {\n\t\t\t\ti++\n\t\t\t\treturn proxy\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn proxies[0]\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc strategyConsistentHashing(url string)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package config\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"os\"\n\tP \"path\"\n\t\"runtime\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/app\"\n\t\"cfa/native/tunnel\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/config\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/hub\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n)\n\nfunc UnmarshalAndPatch(profilePath string) (*config.RawConfig, error) {\n\tconfigPath := P.Join(profilePath, \"config.yaml\")\n\n\tconfigData, err := os.ReadFile(configPath)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\trawConfig, err := config.UnmarshalRawConfig(configData)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := process(rawConfig, profilePath); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn rawConfig, nil\n}\n\nfunc Parse(rawConfig *config.RawConfig) (*config.Config, error) {\n\tcfg, err := config.ParseRawConfig(rawConfig)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn cfg, nil\n}\n\nfunc Load(path string) error {\n\trawCfg, err := UnmarshalAndPatch(path)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Errorln(\"Load %s: %s\", path, err.Error())\n\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tcfg, err := Parse(rawCfg)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Errorln(\"Load %s: %s\", path, err.Error())\n\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\t// like hub.Parse()\n\thub.ApplyConfig(cfg)\n\n\tapplyProxySelectionsFromOverride()\n\n\tapp.ApplySubtitlePattern(rawCfg.ClashForAndroid.UiSubtitlePattern)\n\n\truntime.GC()\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\ntype persistProxySelections struct {\n\tProxySelections map[string]string &#96;json:\"proxy-selections\"&#96;\n}\n\nfunc applyProxySelectionsFromOverride() {\n\traw := ReadOverride(OverrideSlotPersist)\n\tvar o persistProxySelections\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(raw), \u0026o); err != nil || o.ProxySelections == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tfor group, name := range o.ProxySelections {\n\t\ttunnel.PatchSelector(group, name)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc LoadDefault() {\n\tcfg, err := config.Parse([]byte{})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tpanic(err.Error())\n\t}\n\n\thub.ApplyConfig(cfg)\n}",

            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "func Load(path string) error {"
          },
          {

            "text": "\trawCfg, err := UnmarshalAndPatch(path)"

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
